Star Wars 1/12 General Grievous
Star Wars 1/144 U-Wing Fighter & Tie Striker
Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett Meisho Movie Realization Action Figure Daimyo Boba Fett 18 cm
products.description:
Drawing inspiration from his appearance in the recent Star Wars live-action series on Disney+, Boba Fett joins the Meisho Movie Realization lineup once more in his reclaimed Mandalorian Armor.

In addition to his standard rifle and blaster armaments, this figure will also include a Meisho style version of the Gaffi Stick gifted to him in the series by the Tusken Raiders. Boba Fett's infamous fibercord cable which fires from his right arm gauntlet has also been reimagined as a chain weapon with a small claw at the end for capturing his foes.

Set Contents: Boba Fett figure, jetpack, rifle, blaster, katana, sheath, Gaff Stick weapon, chain claw accessory, 2 pairs of interchangeable hands

It stands approx. 18 cm tall and comes in a closed box.

products.name: Star Wars The Mandalorian ARTFX+ Statue 1/10 Mandalorian 17 cm
products.description:
The newest addition to Kotobukiya's standard Star Wars lineup is an all new ARTFX+ statue based on the new drama series The Mandalorian. The Mandalorian himself will join Kotobukiya's ARTFX+ line!

This new drama series is based off of the Bounty Hunter five years after the events of Star Wars: Return of the Jedi. Line this statue up with IG-11 to fully experience the world of The Mandalorian.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Action Figure S.H. Figuarts Nail 16cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Action Figure of Nail in S.H. Figuarts collection, size approx.16cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

The Dragon Ball Z figures from S.H. Figuarts have been designed with a mobile structure that allows a wide range of images from the series to be recreated. The cape is made up of flexible parts and is also removable.

Interchangeable head parts, with expressions such as clenched teeth and screams, also allow the typical appearance of Nail in battle scenes to be reproduced. A defeated face is also included, allowing it to be combined with the S.H Figuarts Frieza First Form & Frieza Pod (sold separately) to recreate the scene where Frieza rips off Nail's arm. In addition, part of the arm made of transparent material can be used for the following scene in which Nail regenerates the arm that Frieza ripped off.

This figure also comes with extra head parts to recreate the fusion of Nail and Piccolo when you also own the S.H. Figuarts Piccolo Proud Namekian figure (sold separately).

Contents:

  • Main body
  • 3 types of interchangeable hands (left and right)
  • 4 types of interchangeable faces
  • Interchangeable right arm part

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Statue 1/4 Bojack Movies Collection By Tsume 63cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Statue of Bojack in Movies Collection, 1/4 scale size approx.63cm. Official product in limited edition of 700 pieces by Tsume Art.

The Dragon Ball Z Movies Collection continues with a new release: Bojack Unbound, featuring an imposing Bojack DBZ statue dedicated to the iconic antagonist from the movie. This statue Dragon Ball Z captures the sheer power and intimidating presence of the galactic pirate, making it an essential piece for any fan.

This piece from the Dragon Ball Z statue collection brings Bojack to life with incredible detail. His imposing posture and precisely sculpted face reflect his charisma and menacing demeanor. Every element contributes to recreating the tension of one of the most intense battles in the DBZ saga.

Why is this piece a must-have?

  • A perfectly sculpted face: Bojack is depicted in all his glory, with detailed features, a chilling expression, and piercing eyes that capture his menacing aura.
  • A massive statue: Standing at 63 cm tall, this statue commands an impressive presence, paying homage to one of DBZ's greatest threats.
  • Breathtaking details: From his clothing to his accessories and finely textured jewelry, every aspect of this statue has been crafted to deliver a spectacular result.

The Movies Collection continues…

Bojack marks the second statue in the Dragon Ball Z Movies Collection, and many more iconic characters are coming to complete this series. Stay tuned to find out who will be next to join this incredible collection!

Movies Collection:

Tsume's Movies Collection is an invitation to rediscover the world of Dragon Ball in a whole new light. Featuring highlights from the films, this collection allows fans to relive the epic battles and memorable scenes that have shaped the Dragon Ball legend. With 15 years' experience and an unwavering commitment to quality, Tsume continues to push back the boundaries of creation to offer enthusiasts unique and exceptional collector's items.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Statue 1/6 Super Saiyan 3 Gotenks HQS Dioramax by Tsume 48cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Statue of Super Saiyan 3 Gotenks in HQS Dioramax, 1/6 scale size approx.48cm. Official product in limited edition of 800 pieces by Tsume Art.

This new HQS Dioramax from Tsume in the Dragon Ball Z license captures all the power and exuberance of Gotenks in his Super Saiyan 3 form, during his Kamikaze Ghost attack. This dynamic scene showcases the hero as he summons his famous Kamikaze Ghosts. Every detail of the scene is designed to recreate the intensity of the moment, with Gotenks charging towards the enemy accompanied by his ghosts!

The seven ghosts, with their unique facial expressions, reflect the crazy nature of the attack. Their dynamism and individuality are reinforced by Gotenks' explosive stance, creating a vibrant, lively scene.

The scenery is rich in detail, immersing the scene in an epic atmosphere. Each element is finely sculpted, bringing depth and realism to the whole.

The LED sequence adds a spectacular touch with intense electric light around Gotenks and a softer sequence for the water, creating an immersive atmosphere.

  • W : 48 cm
  • D : 49 cm
  • H : 54 cm

products.name: Dragon Ball Super Vinyl Original Soundtrack Vol.2 2x
products.description:
Dragon Ball Super Vinyl Soundtrack. Official product by Microids Records.

Son Goku is back to face a new threat that is descending upon Earth.

Synopsis: Goku goes to train with Master Kaio, who informs him that a powerful enemy has awakened from a 39-year slumber: Beerus, God of Destruction. Beerus is searching for a warrior who appeared to him in a dream, the Super Saiyan God, whom he wishes to challenge.

The vinyl includes numerous BGM from the Future Trunks and Universe Survival arcs. They range from dark to epic in a very orchestral style with the legendary Norihito Sumitomo composing (DBZ: Battle of Gods, the film, as well as video games like Gran Turismo). Some BGMs were created by Kazuya Yoshii and Takafumi Iwasaki, the latter having worked on musical projects for spin-offs of Digimon and Konosuba.

products.name: Dragon Ball Super Vinyl Original Soundtrack Vol.1 2x
products.description:
Dragon Ball Super Vinyl Soundtrack. Official product by Microids Records.

DRAGONBALL SUPER is a Japanese anime produced by Toei Animation Studios. Scripted by original Dragon Ball author Akira Toriyama, it follows his work and begins shortly after my defeat of Boo in Dragon Ball Z.. "Four years after Boo's death, peace has returned to Earth, and everyone is living in peace. Goku has become a farmer, and Vegeta spends time with his family. However, the desire to train and grow stronger never leaves them. Goku goes to train with Master Kaio, who tells him that a powerful enemy has awakened from a 39-year slumber: Beerus, God of Destruction. The latter is looking for a warrior who appeared to him in a dream, the Divine Super Saiyen, against whom he wishes to measure himself." The anime has been broadcast since 2017 in France on Toonami in a censored version, then in an uncensored version 1 month later. There are 131 episodes and 2 features. The anime doesn't resume until 2025.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Vinyl Soundtrack Best Collection Limited Edition 2x
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Vinyl Soundtrack. Official product by Microids Records.

Dragon Ball Z picks up five years after Son Goku's wedding. Radditz, a mysterious space warrior, arrives on Earth to find Goku, who then learns that he comes from a planet of warriors of which only four survivors remain. The storyline is based on a succession of increasingly strong opponents, but there is also frequently a quest or travel context that lends interest to more than just the duels. The series has become a worldwide phenomenon, generating massive merchandising sales and being considered one of the most influential anime franchises of all time. Chiho Kiyooka (YU YU HAKUSHO), Takeshi Ike (TRANSFORMERS) and Keiju Ishikawa (GODZILLA) collaborated on the anime series' iconic music.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Statue 1/4 Son Goku Super Saiyan Special Color HQS Dioramax by Tsume 90cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Statue of Son Goku Super Saiyan Special Color in HQS Dioramax, 1/4 scale size approx.90cm. Official product in limited edition of 600 pieces by Tsume Art.

SUPER SAIYAN

Son Goku is represented here in two versions. The first, Saiyan undergoing transformation. The second, as a Super Saiyan ready to fight. This HQS Dioramax is therefore offered with 2 characters and an additional base in order to be able to display everything. For this special version, we opted for a paint close to the colors of the anime.

CULT

The most cult transformation, all anime combined...

So many childhood memories, when, fans of Dragon Ball Z, we mimed this transformation in the schoolyard... Revolted by Krillin's death, Son Goku unleashes his rage and reveals his power, transforming into a Super Saiyan to face Frieza in this epic fight.

LED SEQUENCE

LEDs representing Son Goku's explosion of power are present on the statue. Whether fixed or via a sequence (with synchronized audio via an external speaker not included), you will relive this cult passage through an intensity that only Tsume can offer.

W : 57 CM x D : 57 CM x H : 90 CM

SUPER SAIYAN

Son Goku is represented here in two versions. The first, Saiyan undergoing transformation. The second, as a Super Saiyan ready to fight. This HQS Dioramax is therefore offered with 2 characters and an additional base in order to be able to display everything. For this standard version, we opted for a paint respecting the official settings.

CULT

The most cult transformation, all anime combined...

So many childhood memories, when, fans of Dragon Ball Z, we mimed this transformation in the schoolyard... Revolted by Krillin's death, Son Goku unleashes his rage and reveals his power, transforming into a Super Saiyan to face Frieza in this epic fight.

LED SEQUENCE

LEDs representing Son Goku's explosion of power are present on the statue. Whether fixed or via a sequence (with synchronized audio via an external speaker not included), you will relive this cult passage through an intensity that only Tsume can offer.

W : 57 CM x D : 57 CM x H : 90 CM

products.name: Ultimate Guard Boulder 100+ Druidic Secrets Impetus (Dark Orange)
products.description:
Ultimate Guard Boulder 100+ Druidic Secrets Impetus (Dark Orange). Produit officiel par Ultimate Guard.

Turn your deck boxes into a mystical place! With the Druidic Secrets Boulder 100+, you not only get a reliable card deck box of the highest Ultimate Guard quality, but also a real eye-catcher with its magical ornaments - whether as a single box or a perfect addition to our Druidic Secrets Bundle. With six exclusive colors and mystical patterns, you're sure to find the deck box that's right for you. The Druidic Secrets Boulder 100+ has our famous soft-touch finish, and inside the box fit 100 double-sleeved cards.

  • Designed for 100 double-sleeved or 120 single-sleeved cards
  • Modular design to combine with a variety of Ultimate Guard products
  • Durable and rigid box
  • The perfect complement to the limited edition Ultimate Guard Druidic Secrets Bundle
  • Soft-touch finish
  • Secure closure

Box size: 76 × 75 × 98.5 mm

products.name: Ultimate Guard Katana: The Shogun's Journey - Part 1 - Samurai's Chest (Omnihive 1000+ Xenoskin & Play-Mat)
products.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of ancient Japan with the first installment of our Katana series, The Shogun's Journey! The Samurai's Chest consists of an Omnihive Xenoskin in the style of traditional Japanese wood art and a Play-Mat that takes you on a journey to a cloud-covered mountain village. The Omnihive holds over 1000 standard-size cards (double-sleeved), and the deck box, like the Play-Mat, is limited and exclusive to this bundle.

 

FEATURES OMNIHIVE

 

Designed for 1000+ double-sleeved or 1250+ single-sleeved cards
Great for Commander/EDH decks
Convenient for carrying multiple decks, dice, and/or Play-Mats
Two magnetic trays for flexible positioning and storing of accessories or double-sleeved cards
Quality microfiber inner lining
Strong magnetic closure with additional ZnapClaw locking mechanism
Resistant Xenoskin material
Modular design to combine with Ultimate Guard products
Dimensions approx.: 238 x 92 x 407 mm

 

FEATURES PLAYMAT

 

Protects gaming cards and accessories during gameplay
Full colour print with limited artwork design
Anti-slip underside for maximum gaming grip
Natural rubber
2mm thick soft cushioned Play-Mat
Size: 61 x 35 cm

products.name: Gamegenic Slide Card Case
products.description:
Gamegenic Slide Card Case. Produit officiel par Gamegenic.

Maximum protection for your card in an innovative hard-shell case with sliding mechanism! Protect and present your most precious cards in this hard-shell card holder. The Slide Card case can hold a standard-size trading card, such as Magic: The GatheringTM, PokémonTM, Flesh & BloodTM or similar, even with an inner pocket. One pack contains 12 Slide Card cases.

products.name: Dragon Ball T-Shirt "DBZ/Vegeta" homme MC navy
products.description:
T-Shirt Dragon Ball. Official product by AbyStyle.

On this t-shirt, ABYstyle has represented Vegeta in "Majin Vegeta", its most powerful version, in a battle against Goku. He is possessed by an evil spirit, allowing him to see his strength tenfold maximum. On the back, we have recorded "Majin Vegeta" in Japanese.

  • Tubular fit. Short sleeves, finely ribbed round neckline.
  • High quality t-shirt: 145g/m², 100% cotton
  • T-shirt for man. Available in 3 sizes: S, M, L
  • Color: blue navy
